titleStmt.title: SII 6.910: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 910. (A.R. No. 294 of 1899). IN THE TWENTY-FOURTH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatāṁ sakalabhuvanasaṁstūyamānamānavyasagōtrāṇāṁ kauśikīvaraprasādalabdharājyānāmmātṛgaṇaparipā
litānāṁ svāmimahāsēnapādānudhyāyināṁ bhagavannārāyaṇaprasādasamāsāditavaravarāhalāṁchanēkṣaṇa
kṣaṇavaśīkṛtārātimaṁḍalānāmaśvamēdhāvabhṛtasnānapavitrīkṛtavapuṣāṁ cāḷukyānāṁ kulamalaṁka
riṣṇuḥ . Asti śrīmānupēṁdrakṣititilakaśaśī sa¨rvvalōkā bhirāmaḥ kī¨rttijyōtsnākaḷānānnidhiriṣukiraṇadhvastavai
¨ryyaṁdhakāraḥ . prāyaḥ padmāptapādaprakaḷanavibhavōdrēkasaṁpā dāmā śaśvat saṁpū¨rttihētu¨rguṇamaṇivila
satkōvidāṁbhōnidhīnāṁ . 1 śrīśākābdē gajādrigrahapatigaṇitē śrāvaṇē kāvyavārē kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāmmakhāyāṁ hari
śikharipatē ssannidhānē sadaṁḍaṁ . datvā dīpaṁ sapuṣpasrajamapi nṛpatiḥ puṣpavāṭīmajānāṁ gōpālāḍhyaṁ śa
taṁ sma pradiśati ca tayō¨rnnityasaṁsiddhihētōḥ . 2 śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1278 gunēṁṭi śrāvaṇa kṛṣṇāṣṭamiyu
śukravāramunāṁḍu sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhana mahārājulaina Upēṁdradēvacakrava¨rtti tanaku niṣṭā¨rtthasiddhi
gā śrīnarasiṁhanāthuni sannidhiyaṁdu nityamunnu Akhaṁḍadīpamu veluṁguṭaku Elamaṁci paṁpenabōyuni ko
ḍuku vāsanabōyuni vaśamuna beṭṭina goṟyalu nūṟunu lekka 100 . ciṁgūpaḍirāyuni koḍuku gōpinātha
nāyunicēṁ buṣpagaṭṭu vilivi nitya dōṁḍatirumāla veṭṭanu Ī gōpināthanāyuniki teruvapalli kṣētramu puṭṭeṁḍu
vāśanaku teruvavalli kṣētramu puṭṭeṁḍu peṭiri
Digital edition of SII 6.910 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
